justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, including specific days and times, and adjusted its search parameters accordingly.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed close alternatives when the initial request was unavailable, offering other days and then expanding the search within the requested day.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and made API calls without any redundant questions or unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone and successfully booking the appointment without any friction points.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully when appointments were unavailable, maintaining full context and intelligently expanding its search without re-asking for information.
